KmaApiHubStructuredOutput.description: Normalized output from one KMA APIHub structured operation.
KmaApiHubStructuredOutput.title: KmaApiHubStructuredOutput

base_date.description: KMA village forecast base date, YYYYMMDD. Use a recent KST date within the APIHub retention window; stale catalog sample dates are rejected. Official parameter name: base_date. Operation: VilageFcstInfoService_2.0/getVilageFcst.
base_date.title: Base Date

base_time.description: KMA village forecast base time, HHMM. Use the latest valid KST issue slot for the selected operation; stale catalog sample times are rejected. Official parameter name: base_time. Operation: VilageFcstInfoService_2.0/getVilageFcst.
base_time.title: Base Time

data_type.description: Response format requested from KMA APIHub. XML is the official sample/default; JSON may be used only when the operation supports it. Official parameter name: dataType. Operation: VilageFcstInfoService_2.0/getVilageFcst.
data_type.title: Data Type

num_of_rows.description: Number of rows to return. Use the default unless more rows are needed. Official parameter name: numOfRows. Operation: VilageFcstInfoService_2.0/getVilageFcst.
num_of_rows.title: Num Of Rows

nx.description: KMA APIHub request parameter nx. Official parameter name: nx. Operation: VilageFcstInfoService_2.0/getVilageFcst.
nx.title: Nx

ny.description: KMA APIHub request parameter ny. Official parameter name: ny. Operation: VilageFcstInfoService_2.0/getVilageFcst.
ny.title: Ny

page_no.description: Page number, 1-based. Use the default unless the citizen asks for another page. Official parameter name: pageNo. Operation: VilageFcstInfoService_2.0/getVilageFcst.
page_no.title: Page No
